search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" | where widget="DNS Error Response Error Codes" OR field_name = "Response Packets" |stats latest(_time) as _time by apex_dashboard | sort 0 - _time | head 1 | table apex_dashboard | rename apex_dashboard as url_token

html.a: Click here to visit the Apex dashboard

html.div:
No Apex Dashboard Available
No events received in the last 24 hours. Check your Apex configuration and ensure events are being sent to Splunk.
Configure Add-on Settings

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name="Response Packets" | where isnotnull(response_code) | stats sum(current_value) AS "Response Packets" BY response_code| rename response_code AS "Response Code"

table.title: Response packets by server containing DNS error codes over last 60 minutes

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name="Response Packets" | where isnotnull(current_value) AND isnotnull(ip_address_server)| stats sum(current_value) AS sum_packets BY ip_address_server, response_code, l7_protocol | eval sum_packets=round(sum_packets,0) | eval "Response Packets"=tostring(sum_packets, "commas") | rename ip_address_server AS "Server IP" response_code AS "Response Code" l7_protocol AS "L7 Protocol" | sort - sum_packets | table "Response Code" "L7 Protocol" "Server IP" "Response Packets"
